message:
chore: collapse match-guard if-blocks to satisfy rolling-nightly clippy

The `rust-toolchain.toml` override pins the workspace to rolling
`channel = "nightly"`, so CI's `dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master` step
with `toolchain: nightly-2025-11-01` gets overridden to today's latest
nightly once cargo is invoked. That newer clippy flags five
`collapsible_match` instances the 2025-11-01 snapshot didn't:

- `rchd/src/api.rs`: three `"debug"|"scheduled"|"all" => if value=="1"...`
  arms converted to match guards.
- `rch/src/ui/markdown.rs`: two `Tag::Paragraph => if !cond { ... }`
  arms converted to match guards.

Semantically equivalent; no user-visible behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
